name: Jebel Hafeet - PJAMM Cycling
snippet: Jebel Hafeet is located in the Al Hajar Mountains in Eastern Arabia. We ride on Jebel Hafeet Mountain Road (built in 1980) the entire length of our climb. Missing: coordinates latitude
